title: Stress & Cognitive Load
description: A brief check on how much stress and mental pressure you have been experiencing recently. Inspired by the Perceived Stress Scale (PSS-10).
disclaimer: This is a self-reflection tool, not a clinical stress assessment. If you are experiencing significant distress, please speak to a qualified mental health professional.

questions.text: In the last month, how often have you felt that things were out of your control?
In the last month, how often have you felt confident in your ability to handle problems?
In the last month, how often have you felt overwhelmed by the amount you have to do?
In the last month, how often have you been able to control irritations in your life?
How difficult is it currently to focus on one task without your mind wandering?
How often do you feel mentally drained by the end of a typical workday?
